rationale: The response wakes up immediately with a brake, refuses making the refrigerator-side confirmer the default workflow, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior manual guard/recheck fixes, and shifts toward upstream causes such as permissions, scanning, capacity, handoff, and responsibility boundaries. It allows only a time-boxed emergency confirmer for the day and explicitly says to remove it from the baseline, so it does not exhibit the fail signal of simply adding another manual gate.
